narrative:
Cincinnati City has 218,247 registered voters, with 63.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.7%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 19.2 percentage points.
